_comment: Dense RF environment profile — active scanning with duplicate filtering.
_comment_why: Reduces the advertising-report volume in environments with 50-100+ advertisers. Combines BlueZ duplicate filtering with whitelists and a modest publish interval to keep CPU and MQTT load low. Active scanning (the only supported mode) uses BlueZ SetDiscoveryFilter on the fully reassembled advertisement, which correctly receives extended advertising (AUX PDUs).
_comment_duplicate_filtering: Suppress duplicate advertisement report data at BlueZ (fewer host-ward reports). Default true.
_comment_filters: App-level whitelists: a device is accepted if it matches any entry. Also drives hardware-level SetDiscoveryFilter UUID filtering when service_uuid_whitelist is set.
